name: claude-image-tts-gen
description: Multi-provider image and text-to-speech generation with cost tracking and batch mode.

gemini_api_key.description: Google Gemini API key. Recommended — Gemini is the default provider for both image and TTS. Get one at aistudio.google.com.

openai_api_key.description: OpenAI API key (optional). Enables gpt-image-1 and OpenAI TTS tiers. platform.openai.com/api-keys.

openrouter_api_key.description: OpenRouter API key (optional). Enables image passthrough to OpenRouter-hosted models. openrouter.ai/keys.

elevenlabs_api_key.description: ElevenLabs API key (optional). Enables high-quality TTS and voice cloning via saved voice IDs. elevenlabs.io.

gemini_default_voice.description: Preferred default Gemini TTS voice when no --voice is passed (e.g. Charon for male baritone, Kore for female). See list_providers for the full list.

openai_default_voice.description: Preferred default OpenAI TTS voice (e.g. onyx for male, nova for female). Accepts alloy, echo, fable, onyx, nova, shimmer.

elevenlabs_default_voice.description: Preferred default ElevenLabs voice ID (from Voice Lab). Paste the voice ID as-is, not the display name.

local_default_voice.description: Preferred default voice for the local provider (e.g. am_adam for Kokoro-FastAPI). Depends on your local backend.

local_base_url.description: OpenAI-compatible local server base URL. Defaults to http://localhost:8880/v1 (Kokoro-FastAPI). Override for Orpheus-FastAPI :5005, Speaches :8000, LM Studio :1234, etc.

local_enabled.description: Include the local provider in the failover chain. true/false. Default false. Always usable directly via --provider local regardless of this setting.

gemini_image_model.description: Override the Gemini image model. Leave empty for the default (gemini-2.5-flash-image).

image_output_dir.description: Default directory for generated images. Defaults to ./generated-images in the current working directory.

audio_output_dir.description: Default directory for generated audio. Defaults to ./generated-audio in the current working directory.

state_dir.description: Override the state directory (session spend, cache, budget, batch jobs). Leave empty to use ~/.claude-image-tts-gen.

autoplay.description: Auto-play TTS output after generation. true/false. Default false.

rewrite_prompts.description: Enable the built-in prompt rewriter for images before sending to the provider. true/false. Default true.

emit_sidecar.description: Write a hidden .regenerate.json sidecar next to each generated file for reproducibility. true/false. Default true.

log_level.description: Log verbosity: error, warn, info, or debug. Default info.
